content.content:
1	# GEX/VEX Dashboard — Project Context
2	
3	## Architecture
4	- Python Flask backend + vanilla JS frontend
5	- SQLite (WAL mode) caches pre-computed GEX/VEX matrices
6	- Background daemon thread fetches from Tradier API every 55s
7	- Progressive first-load: Phase 1 (nearest 4 exps, ~3s) → Phase 2 (6 months, parallel)
8	- Frontend polls /api/matrix, compares fetched_at timestamps, re-renders only on new data (zero flicker)
9	- Multiple resizable widgets, each with independent ticker/mode/timer
10	
11	## Key Files
12	- app.py: Flask server, build_matrix() and build_matrix_fast(), /api/debug endpoint
13	- data_store.py: SQLite cache, BackgroundFetcher class, progressive trigger_now()
14	- tradier_client.py: Tradier API wrapper, TTL cache, parallel chain fetch
15	- greeks.py: Black-Scholes Greeks engine, GEX/VEX computation
16	- verify_gex.py: Audit script for cross-checking calculations
17	- static/app.js: Multi-widget frontend, 4-tier color engine, settings modal
18	- static/style.css: Dark terminal theme
19	- gexvex.log: File-based log (append mode) for diagnostics
20	
21	## GEX Formula
22	GEX_call = gamma × OI × 100 × S² × 0.01
23	GEX_put = -gamma × OI × 100 × S² × 0.01 (negated — dealer convention)
24	#Pin strike (★) = highest |value| in any individual cell, not row total
25	Pin strike (★) = highest |value| in any individual collumn (i.e., for a given strike price), not row total
26	
27	## VEX Formula  
28	vanna = BS analytical: -e^(-qT) × N'(d1) × d2 / σ × 0.01
29	VEX = vanna × OI × 100
30	
31	## Log Tags (grep-friendly)
32	[TRADIER], [MATRIX:FAST], [MATRIX:FULL], [DB], [BG], [BG:CYCLE], [BG:FETCH], [SUB], [APP]
33	
34	## Color System
35	4-tier heatmap: Extreme Positive (pin), Medium Positive, Medium Negative, Extreme Negative (accelerator)
36	Threshold slider controls tier boundary. Settings persist to localStorage.
37	
38	## Configurability
39	- Though default number of strike prices to fecth is 101 (50 above current price, and 50 below current price), make the count configurable (if config value is N, fetch N above and N below current price, along with current price')
40	- Though default number of months for expiry dates is 6, make it configurable
41	
42	## Known Issues / Active Work
43	- Verify background fetch cycles are running properly (check gexvex.log)
44	- User wants to validate GEX/VEX calc accuracy (use verify_gex.py)
